description: Project-specific commands for IB Box Spread trading application

commands.name: shortcuts:build
commands.description: Run build via Shortcut-friendly script (logs to logs/build_latest.log)

commands.name: shortcuts:test
commands.description: Run tests via Shortcut-friendly script (logs to logs/tests_latest.log)

commands.name: summarize:build-log
commands.description: Summarize latest build log on-device (MLX if available)

commands.name: summarize:test-log
commands.description: Summarize latest test log on-device (MLX if available)

commands.name: env:install-mlx
commands.description: Install MLX and MLX-LM (Apple Silicon macOS only; safe no-op elsewhere)

commands.name: shortcuts:summarize-file-to-notes
commands.description: Summarize a file and create a macOS Note (provide absolute path as ARG)

commands.name: shortcuts:plan-from-clipboard
commands.description: Draft an engineering plan from clipboard to macOS Notes

commands.name: ai:review-with-mlx
commands.description: Run MLX model code review (set MLX_MODEL, edit ARG to file list)

commands.name: ai:review-with-ollama
commands.description: Run Ollama code review (privacy-preserving, uses codellama:7b)

commands.name: ai:docs-with-ollama
commands.description: Generate API documentation using Ollama (privacy-preserving, uses mistral:7b)

commands.name: setup:platform
commands.description: Auto-detect and configure platform-specific settings

commands.name: setup:platform-full
commands.description: Setup platform settings and configure CMake

commands.name: build
commands.description: Build with AI-friendly JSON output (default; quiet, parseable)

commands.name: build:debug
commands.description: Build project in debug mode (ARM64)

commands.name: build:ai-friendly
commands.description: Quiet build with JSON result (for tools/AI). Use --json-only for stdout-only JSON.

commands.name: build:ai-friendly-json
commands.description: Build and print only JSON result to stdout (quiet, parseable)

commands.name: build:release
commands.description: Build project in release mode (ARM64)

commands.name: build:configure
commands.description: Configure CMake for debug build

commands.name: build:clean
commands.description: Clean build artifacts

commands.name: build:universal
commands.description: Build universal binary (auto-detects architecture)

commands.name: test:run
commands.description: Run all tests with output on failure

commands.name: test:run-release
commands.description: Run tests in release mode

commands.name: lint:run
commands.description: Run all linters (cppcheck, clang-tidy, etc.)

commands.name: lint:ai-friendly
commands.description: Run linters in AI-friendly mode (quiet, log to logs/, emit JSON)

commands.name: lint:ai-friendly-json
commands.description: Run linters and print only JSON to stdout (for tools/AI)

commands.name: lint:exarp
commands.description: Run exarp-go lint (default: Go only; for shell use just exarp-lint-shell or pass JSON args)

commands.name: exarp:tool
commands.description: Run exarp-go tool (usage: ARG=tool_name, e.g. lint, testing, security)

commands.name: exarp:list-tools
commands.description: List available exarp-go tools

commands.name: exarp:task-discovery
commands.description: Run exarp task discovery and create Todo2 tasks (use MCP task_discovery with create_tasks=true in chat)
commands.command: echo 'In Cursor chat, ask: Run task_discovery with create_tasks=true. Or: ./scripts/run_exarp_go_tool.sh task_discovery "{\"action\":\"comments\",\"create_tasks\":true}"'

commands.name: run:tui
commands.description: Run TUI application (dry-run mode)

commands.name: run:cli
commands.description: Run CLI application (dry-run mode)

commands.name: run:cli-with-config
commands.description: Run CLI with config file (dry-run)

commands.name: setup:worktree
commands.description: Setup new git worktree with build

commands.name: setup:ramdisk
commands.description: Setup RAM disk for faster builds

commands.name: ramdisk:status
commands.description: Check RAM disk status

commands.name: ramdisk:save
commands.description: Save RAM disk contents to disk

commands.name: ramdisk:shutdown
commands.description: Save and shutdown RAM disk

commands.name: docs:list
commands.description: List all global docs paths for Cursor setup

commands.name: docs:sync
commands.description: Sync global docs configuration

commands.name: check:tws
commands.description: Check TWS API download and setup

commands.name: check:feature-parity
commands.description: Check feature parity across implementations

commands.name: validate:config
commands.description: Validate configuration file

commands.name: build:dependencies
commands.description: Build Intel Decimal and TWS API dependencies

commands.name: test:tws-connection
commands.description: Test TWS connection (requires TWS/Gateway running)

commands.name: format:code
commands.description: Format code using clang-format

commands.name: check:build-status
commands.description: Check current build status and binary locations

commands.name: clean:all
commands.description: Clean all build artifacts and generated files
commands.command: rm -rf build/* cmake-build-* && find . -name 'CMakeCache.txt' -delete && find . -name 'CMakeFiles' -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true

commands.name: info:project
commands.description: Show project information and status
commands.command: echo 'Project: IB Box Spread Universal' && echo 'Architecture: $(uname -m)' && echo 'Build Presets:' && cmake --list-presets 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'macos-(arm64|x86_64)|windows|linux' || echo 'Run: cmake --list-presets'

commands.name: docs:scorecard
commands.description: Generate accurate project scorecard with real metrics

commands.name: docs:scorecard-custom
commands.description: Generate project scorecard to custom path (provide path as ARG)

commands.name: git:pull-safe
commands.description: Pull with uncommitted changes: stash → pull → pop
